name: SaaS Solution Website
purpose: A complete product-led SaaS website family spanning marketing, product, proof, adoption, updates, integrations, and sales contact surfaces.

pages.purpose: Sales qualification form and success state

useWhen: A SaaS product needs a complete product-led marketing narrative
A real interface preview can carry the product proof
Automation, integrations, and reliability are material buying criteria
avoidWhen: The page is a single-feature launch
There is no reviewed product model behind the interface claims
neverInvent: Do not copy Linear branding, copy, assets, or proprietary interface details
Do not hard-code brand primitives inside reusable components
Do not use left/right-only layout APIs where logical properties work
Do not invent production customer claims from seeded demo content

queryParameters.seed: Integer used to deterministically select product, company, people, pricing, and proof data.
